prompt: A dark, cinematic album-cover-style scene inside a high-rise room at night, viewed from a moody interior looking out over a vast modern city filled with dense skyscraper lights. On the left side, a solitary man sits slouched beside a tall rain-speckled window, his face obscured in deep shadow and cigarette smoke drifting upward, wearing a dark suit or open-collar dress shirt with a disheveled, brooding presence. In the lower left foreground, place exactly 2 liquor bottles, 1 short tumbler glass with amber whiskey, and a cluttered tabletop reflecting low warm light. Outside the giant window on the right, a winged human figure with large black feathered wings hovers or descends over the city, silhouetted dramatically against a huge luminous full moon surrounded by torn clouds and faint sparkling particles in the sky. The palette is nearly monochrome with cold blue-black shadows and small warm amber highlights from the drink and room lights. Add layered atmospheric haze, smoke, wet glass texture, dramatic contrast, realistic photography blended with dark fantasy, luxury noir, melancholic and dangerous mood. Across the lower middle, overlay large ornate serif title typography reading Soul King D'Ryoichi, with a decorative crown and flourishes integrated into the lettering. Beneath it, add a smaller elegant Japanese subtitle line reading 見上げた月は存外に綺麗で. Make it look like a premium music single cover or visual for lyrics, highly detailed, polished, cinematic, centered composition, square format.
